hero.headline: Sharp lines. *Straight work.*
hero.subheadline: We show up when we say we will — with a price you agreed to.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Parking lot stripes that stay put
services_section.subheading: Clean lines, quality paint, done right the first time

services.title: Parking Lot Striping
services.description: Fresh lines for retail centers, offices, and commercial properties. Straight, bright, and built to last through Kentucky weather.

services.title: Driveway Paving
services.description: Smooth asphalt driveways from prep to finish. We handle the whole job so you don't have to coordinate multiple crews.

services.title: Line Re-Striping
services.description: Refresh faded parking lot lines before they disappear completely. Quick turnaround to keep your business compliant.

services.title: Handicap Spaces
services.description: ADA-compliant handicap parking spaces and signage. We know the regulations so your property stays up to code.

about.heading: Bowling Green's line striping crew
about.body: We're the guys who answer the phone on the first ring and show up with a price that sticks. No surprises, no excuses.

reviews.name: Tanner C.
reviews.text: Arrived on time with a rate we were happy to pay. The lines are sharp and straight as can be. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.name: Haris B.
reviews.text: Called and got an instant answer with price and date. They delivered exactly as promised. Straight on top of their game.

reviews.name: Alex P.
reviews.text: Professional, friendly, hard working guys that deliver great quality services. Highly recommend!

cta.heading: Ready for sharp lines that last?
cta.body: Call us for a straight answer and an honest price. No games, no surprises — just quality work.
